summary: Comprehensive testing of Partner Org mandatory field feature for platform admin preset creation. Backend: 7/7 tests pass. Frontend: All 11 specified features confirmed working via Playwright UI tests. Full E2E flow tested: create/filter/edit/delete custom presets with partner org enforcement.

backend_1_no_tenant_returns_400.evidence: POST /api/admin/presets without tenant_id → 400 with detail 'Partner org is required for platform admins — please select a partner org.'

backend_2_invalid_tenant_returns_404.evidence: POST /api/admin/presets with tenant_id='nonexistent-tenant-id-xyz-9999' → 404 with detail 'Partner org not found'

backend_3_valid_tenant_creates_preset.evidence: POST /api/admin/presets with valid tenant_id creates preset with is_custom=true and correct tenant_id stored

backend_4_permissions_modules_has_tenant.evidence: GET /api/admin/permissions/modules returns custom presets with tenant_id field and is_system=false

frontend_1_partner_org_first_field.evidence: Partner Org field (data-testid=preset-tenant-trigger) appears before Preset Name input in DOM order

frontend_2_partner_org_search.evidence: data-testid=preset-tenant-search found in dropdown, shows 2 partner orgs (Automate Accounts, TEST_HardeningOrg). Search filters correctly.

frontend_3_save_blocked_without_org.evidence: Toast: 'Partner org is required — please select a partner org' shown when clicking Save without selecting org

frontend_4_edit_mode_readonly.evidence: In edit mode: preset-tenant-trigger absent (no dropdown), 'Automate Accounts' shown as text with 'Cannot be changed' label

frontend_5_filter_dropdown.evidence: data-testid=preset-filter-partner-trigger shows 'All Partner Orgs' button above Custom Presets section

frontend_6_filter_search.evidence: data-testid=preset-filter-partner-search found in filter dropdown, shows tenant options

frontend_7_tenant_badge_on_card.evidence: Custom preset card shows 'Custom' and 'Automate Accounts' badges when created as platform admin

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: In update_preset (PUT), tenant_id_of(admin) is used for duplicate-name check (line 119) which may be wrong for platform admins - they may have a different tenant_id than the preset. However, since platform admins can see all presets via get_tenant_filter, this is acceptable behavior.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_UI_Preset_256 (custom preset for 'Automate Accounts') during UI testing. TEST_Preset_256 backend test preset was also created and cleaned up. No leftover test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 features for Partner Org mandatory field in preset creation verified working. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter256_preset_partner_org.py. Key flows: (1) Platform admin must select partner org when creating preset - frontend blocks with toast + backend returns 400; (2) Edit mode shows partner org as read-only with 'Cannot be changed' text; (3) PresetsSubTab has 'All Partner Orgs' filter dropdown with search; (4) Preset cards show tenant name badge. All test data cleaned up.
